meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio barrier. Learn to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to ship production-ready SaaS projects rapidly. Build your reputation now.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; it is an execution gap. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can build high-fidelity, revenue-generating SaaS MVPs in hours. Stop waiting for clients and start shipping code that demonstrates technical mastery, market validation, and sophisticated architectural thinking to future stakeholders immediately.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty portfolio is deafening for a founder. You have the vision, the drive, and the market insight, but you are stuck behind a wall of 'show me your work' demands. You feel like a ghost in the machine, capable of building empires but unable to prove your worth to the gatekeepers of capital and talent.

But the game has changed. We are no longer limited by the speed of manual coding. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you can collapse the distance between idea and deployment. This isn't just about writing code; it's about architecting high-value solutions that prove your technical authority. Let’s turn your empty repository into a showcase of professional-grade SaaS engineering.

steps.title: Define Your High-Value SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a small, painful B2B problem that requires a functional CRUD application. Focus on solving one specific workflow to ensure rapid completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a PRD for a lean B2B SaaS MVP that solves a specific, monetizable problem. Include features, tech stack (Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase), and a schema design.

steps.title: Initialize the Technical Foundation
steps.description: Create the project scaffold. A clean, professional codebase is the first sign of a seasoned developer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and initial setup script for a Next.js 14 project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, following clean architecture patterns.

steps.title: Implement Database Schema with Supabase
steps.description: Establish the data layer. A working database schema proves you understand data modeling and state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the SQL migration scripts for a multi-tenant SaaS database including tables for Users, Organizations, and Subscriptions.

steps.title: Build the Core Functional Workflow
steps.description: Focus on the 'Aha!' moment of your app. This is the feature that provides immediate value to your user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust server-side action to handle user authentication and create an initial organization record in the database using Supabase client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'lib/actions.ts' --prompt 'Implement secure server actions for user registration and org creation'

steps.title: Document and Deploy for Proof
steps.description: Ship the code to Vercel. A live URL is worth 1,000 lines of code in your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README.md that highlights the architectural decisions, the specific problem solved, and the technical challenges overcome during this build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'git push origin main && vercel --prod'

pro_tips: Always commit your work with descriptive, atomic messages; a clean git history is a portfolio in itself.
Focus on error handling and edge cases in your code to show you think like a senior engineer, not just a prompter.
Use Antigravity to analyze your own code periodically to find refactoring opportunities that improve performance.
Don't just build the UI; build the monitoring and logging layers to show you understand production-grade SaaS.
Treat your README as a sales document; explain the 'why' behind your tech stack choices clearly.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, create a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the product workflow and pin it to your GitHub profile and LinkedIn.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of portfolio hold your vision hostage. With Claude Code and the right architectural approach, you are days away from a professional-grade showcase. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
